sections.title: Standard dialogue after Priest in Peril

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Greetings again adventurer. How go your travels in Morytania? Is it as evil as I have heard?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my wolfbane dagger.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Yes I know, but you have no space for a it at the moment so I can't return it to you.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Yes, I know! Luckily for you it washed up on the banks of the Salve earlier! Here, take it again, but please try and be more careful this time.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: It's a family heirloom after all!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've lost my library key.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Ok, here's another one for you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks for that!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know of anything I can do in Morytania?

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Well... I don't think so. There's not much to do in that place.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Well, not a great deal... but there is something you could do for me if you're interested. Though it is quite dangerous.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, what is it, I may be able to help?

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: There's a man called Filliman who lives in Mort Myre. He comes by the temple from time to time but I haven't seen him recently. I was wondering if you could check in on him?

lines.speaker: Drezen
lines.text: I must warn you though, it could be dangerous. Mort Myre is filled with ghasts!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I'll go look for him.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: That's great! Many thanks!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Now, please be aware of the ghasts, you cannot attack them, only Filliman knew how to take them on. Just run from them if you can. If you get lost, try to make your way back to the temple.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Please take this food to Filliman, he'll likely appreciate it. His home is somewhere in the southern end of Mort Myre. I don't know the exact location I'm afraid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry, if he's there and he's still alive, I'll find him.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I don't think I can help.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: That's fine, I'm sure someone else will be along shortly who can. Now, if you excuse me, I do have some things to be getting on with.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, not interested.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Well, I understand. You must be busy.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi there! Filliman says I've completed the quest!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: That's fantastic, well done!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Hello, [player name]. How are things in Morytania?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not as well as I'd hope, Drezel. I'm still working with the Myreque. I just hope that we can find a way to defeat those Drakans.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: You can be sure that a great many people hope for exactly the same thing, [player name]. Good luck to you, and Myreque prevail!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Myreque prevail, Drezel.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: How's everything going, [player name]?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We've managed to create a new weapon to fight the vampyres with. I used it to kill Ranis Drakan!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: This is amazing news, [player name]. Myreque prevail!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Myreque prevail, Drezel.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: [player name]. How are things?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: As well as they could be, everything considered. We lost everything, Drezel.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Not everything. There's still you, me and Ivan. Veliaf is out there somewhere as well. It's not much, but it's something to be thankful for.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Morytania has never been darker. Trust in Saradomin, friend. There is still a chance we will live through this darkness.

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Please give me your answer!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Nope, not correct!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Correct!

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: Ah! Here you go!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Drezel
lines.text: I need you to help me with this.
